mapper.select: SELECT id, user_uuid, biz_type, biz_order_no, title, status, status_text, pre_deduct_points, actual_cost_points, refund_points, extra_deduct_points, frozen_points, balance_before, balance_after, started_at, finished_at, latest_at, remark, created_at, updated_at FROM credit_consume_record WHERE user_uuid = #{userUuid} ORDER BY latest_at DESC, id DESC
